name: @filepad/agent-access-public-repo
description: Public Agent Access SDK and MCP server packages for Filepad.

scripts.typecheck:mcp: pnpm -C packages/agent-access-sdk build && pnpm -C packages/mcp-server typecheck
scripts.test:mcp: pnpm -C packages/agent-access-sdk build && pnpm -C packages/mcp-server test
scripts.pack:check: pnpm -C packages/agent-access-sdk build && pnpm -C packages/mcp-server build && pnpm pack:check:sdk && pnpm pack:check:mcp
scripts.validate:agent-access: pnpm check:agent-public-boundary && pnpm typecheck:agent-sdk && pnpm test:sdk && pnpm typecheck:mcp && pnpm test:mcp
scripts.validate:agent-access:release: pnpm validate:agent-access && pnpm pack:check && pnpm proof:clean-install
